title: SetInW Statement
parameters:
portNumber	Integer expression representing the input port number.

value	Integer expression between 0 - 65535 to set the specified word to.
description: SetInW provides the ability to set up to 16 bits of virtual inputs at once.
see_also:
For Virtual IO, sets specified input word (16 bits) to the specified value.

SetIn

SetSw

SetInW Example

> setinw 0, 1  ' Sets the first bit of word 0 to On.
examples: > setinw 0, 1  ' Sets the first bit of word 0 to On.
